creator: riggs@FreeBSD.org
text:
This is an intentional limitation of the rust bootstrap process. As of now, the stable releases of rust do not tolerate the presence of an already installed rust package during build. That's why it says:

===>  rust-1.9.0_1 conflicts with installed package(s): 
      rust-1.9.0

      They will not build together.
      Please remove them first with pkg delete.
*** Error code 1

On a more general note: Portmaster and portupgrade are not state of the art for package building. Please consider switching to poudriere. It is strongly recommended since it allows to build packages repeatably in a controlled environment, see https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en/books/porters-handbook/testing-poudriere.html
